side_effects.description: Previously tried HRT but had to stop due to activation of autoimmune illness

protocol_notes: About to start Reta. Went from 130 to ~170 lbs post-COVID (long COVID). Has spent ~2 years researching HRT; tried multiple forms but stopped due to autoimmune reaction. Interested in Reta for weight loss and inflammation. Has doctor prescription for Mounjaro but prefers Reta due to cost and research. Researching titration schedule.
